title: Drill-Hole Conditions and Summary
notes: Drillers can mark breakthrough, dirt, bad, and wet hole conditions during hole entry.
Drill Log condition colors now match the Shot Diagram: yellow breakthrough, brown dirt, red bad, and blue wet outline.
The Drill Log PDF now begins with a summary sheet containing condition counts and footage totals.
CSV, JSON, notes pages, and share text preserve the new condition fields.
The shared update checker remains available to current and future MITHRIL templates.
